# Sven Ahrens

> One of Europe's leading consumer monetization and growth leaders, and still hands-on. Eight years scaling Spotify (most recently Director of Global Growth, where his team drove 60%+ of Spotify's subscriber growth and managed over $1B in subscriptions revenue), former CEO of Yousician (20M+ MAU), founder of Newconic Ventures. Based in Berlin. Available now for new work: fractional, board, and advisory, or the right full-time seat.

Sven helps consumer companies grow. He works across the full funnel, not just subscriptions: growth, product, monetization, pricing and packaging, user acquisition, retention, internationalization, and AI transformation. He is AI-forward in practice and ships his own products.

## What he does (ways to engage)

- Lead it: steps in as a full-time, interim, or fractional Growth, Product, Regional, or Business Unit leader and runs it; a senior leader and player-coach from day one.
- Run the team: takes an existing growth or product team and gets it shipping again, focused and accountable.
- Fire-fighter: drops into where it's burning, diagnoses fast, stops the bleeding, then stays to execute it through with the team.
- Board member or observer: the consumer monetization and growth lens on decisions that compound (pricing, retention, packaging).
- Advisor or sounding board: candid, fast, biased toward action for founders and seasoned leaders; references available.

## Key facts

- Eight years at Spotify (2016 to 2024), through the hyper-growth era; ended as Director of Global Growth.
- His Spotify Global Growth team drove 60%+ of Spotify's subscriber growth and managed over $1B in subscriptions revenue.
- CEO of Yousician (2025 to 2026), the company behind the music apps Yousician and GuitarTuna, with 20M+ monthly active users.
- Chief Growth Officer at Muse Group (2024); Board Observer at Female Invest (2024 to present).
- Founder of Newconic Ventures (2019 to present): 20+ angel investments in consumer, prosumer, AI, and subscription startups across the EU and US. Two exits: Butter (to Miro) and Petli (to Agria). Advisory: Peloton, Knowunity, Kittl.
- Earlier: Consultant at Bain & Company (2012 to 2016), incl. a SoundCloud new-markets externship (2014).
- Based in Berlin. Native German; fluent in English, Spanish, and Portuguese. Traveled to 75+ countries.
- Ships his own AI products: trainwithkalle.com and trainingzones.app.

## Works with

Consumer and prosumer companies tackling growth challenges on more than one front (product, monetization, user acquisition, culture and leadership), and companies going through an AI transformation. From pre-seed founders to seasoned leadership teams.

- Website: https://sven.fm
- Book a call: https://calendar.app.google/nZxUFkXKCTPJFuR19

## Contact

The fastest way to start is to book a call (link above). Bring the hard question; he'll bring an honest answer and a view on what to do next.
